name: R-6 react eval specs and fixtures: positive fixtures use the .tsx extension so detectors that parse TSX can match
command: missing=0; for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/react"/g-react-*; do [ -d "$d/positive" ] || continue; n=$(ls "$d/positive"/*.tsx 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "${n:-0}" -ge 1 ] || missing=$((missing+1)); done; [ "$missing" -eq 0 ] && echo tsx_present 1>&2
